name: cta-01
title: CTA 01 — centered band
description: Layout section, ships populated: narrow centered call-to-action band on a card surface with an in-band background slot. Customise by editing the installed copy.

files.content:
--- /** * Cta-01.astro -- layout section: narrow centered call-to-action band on * a card surface. Ships populated (frontend-contract.md §7): * renders a complete block; make it yours by editing this copy you own. * * `background` slot: absolute layer INSIDE the band -- gradients, glows, * patterns (effects items drop in here). */ import { cn } from "../../../lib/utils"; import Button from "../Button.astro"; interface Props { class?: string; [key: string]: unknown; } const { class: className, ...rest } = Astro.props; ---

Ready when you are.

One narrow band, one decision. Every site ends with this section.
